'''Bequin Fobas''' was a [[Nimbanel/Legends|Nimbanel]] [[Lawyer/Legends|attorney]], and was considered famous during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]]. Fobas worked for the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Zorba Desilijic Tiure]], and on the [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] [[22 BBY/Legends|13:3:21]], Zorba was convicted of illegally [[Mining/Legends|mining]] [[ulikuo gemstone]]s, which were prized for their aesthetic, industrial, and—crucially—cultural value, on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kip]]. Fobas attempted to appeal the decision, but was reminded by the case's [[Unidentified Kip magistrate|magistrate]] that Kip had no appeal process. The case was reported on the same [[Standard day/Legends|day's]] issue of [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News']] [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition|CoCo District Edition]].<ref name="HNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
Bequin Fobas was mentioned in the [[in-universe]] [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 48|''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #48'']] issue of HoloNet News,<ref name="HNN" /> written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]] and published on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]]<ref name="Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref> on [[March 21]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN48 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6128630|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=PrinceXizor|date=2002-03-21|time=3:24 PM|archivedate=20200305125429}}</ref>
